decision.reason: The original pilot candidates and repaired lanes informed rule repair, so their post-repair outcomes cannot be used as held-out performance proof.
decision.future_evaluation_rule: A future candidate from any repaired lane can count as evaluation evidence only if the applicable rules, thresholds, ontology version, duplicate controls, and structural-neighborhood rules were frozen before candidate selection.

blocked_claims: Do not count repaired-lane pilot outcomes as clean held-out accuracy.
Do not use O14756, Q6NSJ0, P34949, Q9BXD5, C9JRZ8, P06746, P55263, O60568, O95050, or P51580 as post-repair performance proof.
Do not merge review-only repair-lane evidence into countable labels without a fresh frozen pre-registration.
